creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to Mark Millard from comment #0)

It may well be that this submittal is mostly a reminder
to pick up an up stream fix if/when such becomes
available. I make no claim that the issue is FreeBSD
specific, though it could be. (A FreeBSD vs. gnu
confusion, where it appears to meet both criteria
at the same time?)
